content.en:
Ye Tian will not join any Escape Realm Alliance, when he comprehends the extradimensional rules and advances to the transcendent realm of the second realm, he can definitely easily leave the Six Thousand Realm.

The reason why the Mountain and Sea Realm Lord had no channel to leave was that he was too weak, they were all ordinary First Realm Extradimensional Realms, and they couldn't integrate into those powerful extradimensional forces, so they could only find a way to leave by themselves.

The invitation of the Escape Alliance was just a small matter, and Ye Tian didn't care about it.

However, the appearance of the Escape Alliance this time also let Ye Tian know some information.

There are more than 6,000 extra-dimensional territory sequences and more than 5,000 sequences, and I'm afraid there is a huge gap.

Like the Six Thousand Realm, the Third Realm is almost impossible to find, but in the Five Thousand Territory, the Third Realm is estimated to be many, but the Fourth Realm is absolutely extremely rare.

As you can imagine, Territory No. 1 is definitely the most powerful, but it is also the most difficult to enter.

......

At this trade fair, Ye Tian thought that it would be the same as usual, and there would be nothing to do in the future.

But soon, 20, several extradimensional realms revealed an important piece of information.

This important piece of information relates to the territory of Seven Thousand and One.

"Everyone, according to my information, the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce has evacuated from the Seven Thousand and One Territory Annihilation Place, and now it can be passed. But there are definitely no fragments of the Extradimensional Boundary Stone there, and the Red Dragon Chamber of Commerce will definitely not leave them. There is an extradimensional realm that has taken a look at it in the past, and there are traces of the seven thousand and one territory being bred again. "

"What, the Seven Thousand and One Territory is going to be re-conceived, so quickly?"

"It's not too fast, it's not a long time since you became an extradimensional realm, a long time ago, there was a great war, and many third realms participated in the war, and dozens of extradimensional realms were destroyed on our side, and they were quickly reborn one by one. "

"However, if an extradimensional territory is destroyed twice in a short period of time, it will almost never be conceived again. "

"It is rumored that at the beginning of the gestation of the extradimensional territory, if you enter it, you have a chance to comprehend the extradimensional rules!"

"And that said?"

"There is indeed this saying, after all, the re-birth of the extra-dimensional territory is equivalent to the opening up of the extra-dimensional territory, and all the extra-dimensional rules are manifested. "

"How did I hear there was a price to pay?"

......

Ye Tian listened to the conversations of these extradimensional realms, and there was some expectation in his heart.

It would be great if he could take advantage of the opportunity of the rebirth of the Seven Thousand and One Territory to comprehend a trace of extradimensional rules.

However, there is not much information about these extradimensional realms, so we still have to find a way to inquire carefully.

This time, Ye Tian didn't go to the Heavenly Pavilion to buy information, because the extradimensional realm communicated with each other, and after a long time, specific information came out.

And Ye Tian finally knew the real secret.

It turns out that the extradimensional territory has been reborn, and entering it during this period, it is indeed possible to comprehend the extradimensional rules, but it will withstand the resistance of the entire extradimensional territory, not only the physical body will be under pressure, but even the dimensional path species will be damaged.

As time passed, the extradimensional realm backlash became, and it was almost impossible to fully recover from this injury.

The physical damage is enough, but once the damage of the superdimensional Dao species cannot be recovered, it will not be able to open up the superdimensional realm in the body in the future, and the opportunity to become the third superdimensional realm will be completely lost.

So.

Those extradimensional realms of the second realm would never dare to enter the extradimensional realm that was in the process of being conceived, but the first realm was not necessarily afraid.

Some of the first realms have no room for progress, if they can comprehend the rules of the transcendent dimension, they can break through to the second realm of transcendent realm cultivation, even if they lose the hope of impacting the third realm, but their strength skyrockets, it is worth it.

"It seems that there will still be a lot of extradimensional realms of the first realm entering the seven thousand and one realm!"

Ye Tian will also go in, but not right now.

Now there are only traces of gestation, and it has not really started to gestation yet.

Only when the Seven Thousand and One Territory is conceived can you enter and attain enlightenment, otherwise you will not be able to enter and comprehend anything now.

During this period, the 6000 Territory and the extradimensional realms of other realms were paying attention to this matter.

In the blink of an eye, another three extradimensional epochs have passed.

In such a short period of time, Ye Tian's strength has not improved much, and his cultivation has improved slightly, but he is still far from the middle stage of the first realm of the transcendent realm.

Rumble!!!!

A shock came, and it was the fluctuation transmitted by the Seven Thousand and One Territory. []

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly tore through the boundary extradimensional barrier and rushed over.

It didn't take long.

A supreme transcendent realm rushed to the location of the seven thousand and one realm.

I saw that the extradimensional storm in the land of annihilation was dissipating, and a terrifying force was dissipating the land of annihilation, recondensing the death void in the extradimensional realm, and there were vaguely three extradimensional realms being nurtured, but the front was just a point of light area.

"Seven Thousand and One Territory is being born!"

The extradimensional realms were excited.

Soon, the origin of the 7001 territory was reunited, and wisps of extradimensional rules ran through this extradimensional territory, and the superdimensional 010 rules in the most core area were naturally the strongest.

A famous extradimensional realm naturally didn't want to stay on the periphery, and was rushing towards the inner periphery.

It was also at this time that the power of the entire Seven Thousand and One Territory was suppressed.

Under the suppression of this force, the extra-dimensional body, will, and extra-dimensional power of the extra-dimensional realm were suppressed, and it was difficult to sense the range too far, and the body was cracked a little bit.

The weaker extradimensional realm is no longer able to move forward.

Ye Tian's physical body far exceeded the ordinary extradimensional realm, so he could continue to move forward.

"The Extradimensional Dao Species is really being damaged!

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

He could sense that the extra-dimensional Dao species in his body were infiltrated by the power of the super-dimensional territory, and constantly destroyed his super-dimensional Dao species, this damage was still very weak, and if he went out in time, it could be repaired.

But if it takes a little longer, it can't be repaired.

"For other extradimensional realms, this is the foundation and hope for destroying the future, but for me, it doesn't matter!"

Ye Tian continued to move forward, and the deeper the distance he could advance, the more serious the damage to the Extradimensional Dao Species became, and the injuries on his body became more serious.

Thorough!

Thorough!

Go deeper!

Ye Tian wanted to enter the deepest part of the extradimensional realm, even if he paid a heavy price, even if he sacrificed his body, it would be worth it.
